name: home_assistant
description: Home Assistant — smart home control. Turn on/off lights, check sensor states, run automations. Set HASS_TOKEN and optionally HASS_URL (default: http://homeassistant.local:8123).

endpoints.name: get_states
endpoints.description: List all entity states (lights, sensors, switches, etc.)

endpoints.name: get_state
endpoints.description: Get state of a specific entity (e.g. light.living_room, sensor.temperature)

endpoints.name: call_service
endpoints.description: Call a service (e.g. domain=light, service=turn_on, entity_id=light.bedroom)

endpoints.name: fire_event
endpoints.description: Fire a custom event for automations

endpoints.name: get_history
endpoints.description: Get state history for the last day
